name: vibe-academic-writing
description: Source-grounded academic research, course synchronization, writing, citation, review, and delivery workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Research, cite, write, review, and sync coursework.
interface.longDescription: Plan and complete source-grounded academic assignments, synchronize authorized course materials, audit evidence and citations, and deliver reviewed Word or PDF outputs.
defaultPrompt: Help me start a source-grounded academic assignment.
Synchronize one authorized course's available materials.
Audit my draft's evidence and citations.
